hypotheses.description: Connection pool exhaustion caused by increased session timeout doubling concurrent connection duration
hypotheses.reasoning: The recent commit 2 days ago by sarah.chen increased connection pool timeout from 30s to 60s. This doubles the duration each connection is held open, effectively halving pool capacity under the same load. Combined with the session cleanup refactor 5 days ago moving cleanup to a background worker, sessions may be lingering longer than intended.
uncertainty_flags: no real-time connection pool metrics available

hypotheses.description: Background session cleanup worker is failing silently, causing session accumulation and pool saturation
hypotheses.reasoning: The refactor 5 days ago moved session cleanup to a background worker. If this worker is failing or delayed under load, sessions would accumulate and exhaust the pool. The timing aligns with when the latency spike could have started building.
